nav.invited: I've been invited by my ex

landing.headline: Resolve disputes.
landing.subheadline: The structured, affordable way for separating parents to sort out children, money, and assets — before solicitors get involved.
landing.cardPoint1: See suggested outcomes once both parents submit
landing.cardPoint2: Save around £5,876 compared with the solicitor route
landing.cardFooterBody: Each parent answers independently, the platform compares positions, and you only pay when you need the export.
landing.supportTitle: Professional, court-ready documentation of your entire case.
landing.supportBody: Your case pack can be taken to a solicitor, mediator, or court and shows willingness to resolve matters fairly.
landing.problemTitle: The family-court route is expensive, slow, and built for conflict.
landing.problemBody: FairSettle gives parents a calmer, structured path before the solicitor route takes over.
landing.problemCostBody: Solicitor fees can absorb thousands before a family sees a practical outcome.
landing.problemDelayBody: Arrangements, money, and next steps stay uncertain while everyone waits.
landing.problemConflictBody: Traditional back-and-forth often hardens positions instead of finding common ground.
landing.problemAccessBody: Many families need a neutral system they can start without legal representation.
landing.howBody: Both parents move through the same guided steps independently, then the platform shows where you agree and what still needs resolving.
landing.step1Body: Choose the dispute areas that matter, answer the guided questions, and set out your position clearly.
landing.step2Body: They receive a neutral email invitation and can review, accept, and answer the same structured flow from their side.
landing.step3Body: FairSettle generates a side-by-side comparison showing agreements, disagreements, and the context a court typically considers.
landing.step4Body: Work through suggested outcomes, or purchase the case pack and download the professional PDF when you are ready.
landing.featuresTitle: Every feature is there to reduce confusion and keep progress moving.
landing.featuresBody: The product guides both parents clearly, keeps private responses separate, and produces a usable outcome at the end.
landing.feature1Body: Each person answers guided prompts rather than exchanging uncontrolled free-text arguments.
landing.feature2Body: The product keeps showing the cost difference against the solicitor route so families understand the value early.
landing.feature3Body: Each parent can use their own language while staying in the same case flow.
landing.feature4Body: Invitations, reminders, and status tracking are visible so nobody is left guessing what happens next.
landing.feature5Title: Works even if one parent does not engage
landing.feature5Body: If the other parent never responds, FairSettle can still produce a structured single-party export.
landing.feature6Body: When there are gaps, the platform suggests neutral outcomes and then turns the case into a professional PDF pack.
landing.pricingTitle: Start free. Pay only when you need the case pack.
landing.pricingBody: You can create a case, invite the other parent, and reach the comparison stage before paying for export.
landing.pricingFeatureStart: Create the case and answer your questions
landing.pricingFeatureInvite: Invite the other parent by email
landing.pricingFeatureSavings: Track savings against the solicitor route
landing.pricingFeatureExport: Download the full case export PDF
landing.contactBody: If you have questions about the platform, the process, or whether FairSettle fits your situation, email our team and we’ll point you in the right direction.

register.title: Create Account
register.privacyConsent: I agree to the privacy policy and consent to my information being processed for this case.
register.signInLink: Already have an account? Sign in →
register.confirmEmailBody: We’ve sent a confirmation link to {email}. Confirm your account to continue into FairSettle securely.
register.confirmEmailHintBody: Open the confirmation email from FairSettle, tap the button, and you’ll be brought back to the right next step automatically.

login.title: Sign in
login.startFree: Don't have an account? Start free →
login.magicLinkSent: Check your inbox for a sign-in link.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.body: Enter the email address on your FairSettle account and we’ll send you a secure reset link.
forgotPassword.successBody: We’ve sent a secure reset link to {email}.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.body: Choose a new password for your FairSettle account.
resetPassword.invalidLink: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request another one to continue.
resetPassword.success: Your password has been updated. Redirecting you to sign in…

dashboard.title: Your cases
dashboard.subtitle: Everything you’ve started or been invited to appears here.
dashboard.emptyBody: Start your first case free and we’ll guide you step by step.
dashboard.emptyLinkedBody: You still have invitation steps waiting below. Once you review and accept an invitation, the case will appear in your case list automatically.
dashboard.pendingInvitesTitle: You have a case waiting to be accepted
dashboard.pendingInvitesBody: If someone invited you by email, review and accept the invitation below. The case appears in your case list after you accept it.
dashboard.pendingInvitesHint: This case will appear in your dashboard automatically once you review and accept the invitation.
dashboard.nextStepInvited: Track the invitation or resend it if needed.
dashboard.nextStepActive: Finish the response journey for this case.
dashboard.nextStepComparison: Review side-by-side positions and suggested outcomes.
dashboard.nextStepCompleted: Reopen the comparison or download the case pack.
dashboard.nextStepExpired: Prepare the single-party export for this case.
dashboard.nextStepActiveInitiator: The other parent is completing their side. Track the case here while you wait.
dashboard.nextStepActiveResponder: Finish your question flow so the comparison can be generated.
dashboard.openCaseHint: Open this case to continue from the right stage.

caseCreator.title: New Case
caseCreator.heading: What do you need to resolve?
caseCreator.subtitle: Select all that apply. You can add more later.
caseCreator.createError: We couldn’t create the case. Please try again.
caseCreator.childDescription: Who children live with, when they see each parent, holidays
caseCreator.financialDescription: Income, savings, debts, child maintenance, living costs
caseCreator.combinedDescription: Children + finances + assets — the full picture

questionsFlow.loadingBody: We’re preparing the right path for this case.
questionsFlow.loadError: We couldn’t load your questions. Please try again.
questionsFlow.saveError: We couldn’t save that answer. Please try again.
questionsFlow.submitError: We couldn’t submit your answers. Please try again.
questionsFlow.reviewBody: Check everything carefully before you invite your co-parent.
questionsFlow.toneAdvisory: Try to keep the language factual and neutral — this will make it easier for both of you to agree.

comparison.title: Side-by-side comparison
comparison.subtitle: See where you already agree and where there are still gaps before moving on to suggested outcomes.
comparison.loadError: We couldn’t load the comparison view. Please try again.
comparison.notReady: This comparison will appear once both parties have submitted their answers.
comparison.notReadyHint: If you’ve already answered everything, go back to your dashboard and reopen the case after a refresh. If the other parent is still working, this stage will unlock automatically once they submit.
comparison.nextStepBody: Use this comparison to spot where you already agree and where you still need help. When you’re ready, move on to suggested outcomes.

timeline.title: Case timeline
timeline.subtitle: A chronological record of what has happened in this case so far.

resolution.title: Resolution suggestions
resolution.subtitle: For each remaining gap, FairSettle applies a deterministic rule to suggest a neutral next step.
resolution.loadError: We couldn’t load the suggested outcomes. Please try again.
resolution.empty: There are no unresolved gap items to suggest outcomes for yet.
resolution.nextStepBody: Work through each suggestion and record whether you accept, modify, or reject it. Once you’re done, continue to export your case pack.
resolution.modifyPlaceholder: Write the outcome you want to suggest
resolution.saveError: We couldn’t save that decision. Please try again.

responder.neutralityBody: FairSettle is not controlled by your ex-partner. You each answer the same questions independently. Neither of you can see the other's private notes.
responder.invitedBody: Start by creating an account or signing in. Once you're in, you'll be able to respond to each point and then complete your own structured question set.
responder.registerBody: Use the same secure registration flow as the person who invited you, then we'll bring you straight back to this case.
responder.loginBody: Sign in to accept this invitation and review the other party's positions.
responder.reviewBody: For every point below, tell us whether you agree, disagree, or want to propose a counter-position before you continue to the full question flow.
responder.reviewIntro: These are the positions already submitted in this case. Respond to each one before continuing to your own full question set.
responder.ownCaseTitle: You cannot respond to your own case
responder.ownCaseBody: This invitation belongs to a case you started yourself. Please return to your dashboard to continue as the initiator.
responder.invalidBody: This invitation link is no longer valid. Ask the sender to issue a fresh invitation if you still need access.
responder.noItemsBody: There are no submitted items waiting for your response, so you can go straight to the question flow.

invite.title: Invite your co-parent
invite.subtitle: They'll receive a neutral invitation. It won't share your answers — only that you've started a case.
invite.previewBody: Hi — you've been invited to use FairSettle, a free tool that helps separating parents work out arrangements for children and finances. It's neutral, private, and designed to help you both reach a fair outcome. Tap here to see what's been proposed and share your side →
invite.reminderSchedule: We'll send reminders at 48hrs, 7 days, and 14 days. After 21 days, your case will proceed as a single-party export — documenting your position and their non-engagement.
invite.sentBody: Your co-parent will receive a neutral invitation and reminder schedule. We'll let you know once they join.
invite.statusTracking: Track whether they’ve received, opened, or accepted the invitation, and resend it if they haven’t responded yet.
invite.selfInvite: You can’t invite your own email address to this case.
invite.duplicateActive: There is already an active invitation for this email. Use resend instead.
invite.noInvitesYetBody: Once you send the first invitation, you'll be able to track it here and resend it if needed.
invite.deliveryDelayed: Delivery is taking longer than expected.
invite.deliveryBounced: This email bounced and needs attention.
invite.deliveryComplained: The recipient marked this email as spam.
invite.deliveryFailedVisible: We created the invitation, but the email could not be delivered. Check the invite status below and use resend once the address or provider issue is resolved.

invitePage.title: Invite Other Parent
invitePage.heading: Invite Other Parent
invitePage.subtitle: Send a neutral invitation that opens the responder journey without exposing any of your private answers.

export.title: Your case pack is ready
export.professional: Professional, court-ready documentation of your entire case.
export.standardBody: Everything you need for a clear two-party case pack in one PDF.
export.resolutionBody: Adds draft court-style clauses and a cooperation score for a stronger next step.
export.successPreparing: Payment successful! Your case pack is being prepared...
export.successReady: Your case pack is ready to download.
export.polling: Preparing your PDF and secure download link.
export.cancelled: Checkout was cancelled. You can start again whenever you're ready.
export.singlePartyBody: This case expired without a response, so your single-party submission can be prepared without payment.
export.loadError: We couldn’t load the export screen. Please try again.
export.nextStepInitiator: Choose the export tier you want, complete checkout, and then download the finished case pack.
export.nextStepResponder: The case owner needs to complete checkout. Once they do, they can share the exported pack with you.
export.nextStepSingleParty: This case expired without a response, so you can prepare the single-party pack immediately.
export.initiatorOnlyBody: Only the person who started this case can purchase and download the export pack. You can still review the case, but they need to complete checkout.
export.footerNote: Your case pack can be taken to a solicitor, mediator, or court. It demonstrates willingness to resolve matters fairly.

gdpr.gdprNotice: FairSettle is GDPR compliant. Your information is encrypted and never shared without your explicit consent.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.inviteInvalid: This invitation link is invalid or has expired.
errors.magicLinkFailed: We couldn’t send the magic link. Please try again.
errors.validation: Please check the highlighted fields and try again.
errors.rateLimit: Too many attempts just now. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.invalidCredentials: Those details didn’t match an account. Please try again.
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email address before signing in.
errors.accountExists: An account already exists for this email address. Try signing in instead.
errors.passwordTooShort: Your password must be at least 8 characters long.

invitation.subject: You've been invited to resolve a family matter on FairSettle
invitation.title: You've been invited to FairSettle
invitation.body: Hi — you've been invited to use FairSettle, a free tool that helps separating parents work out arrangements for children and finances. It's neutral, private, and designed to help you both reach a fair outcome. Tap here to see what's been proposed and share your side →

first.subject: Your co-parent is waiting — 48 hour reminder
first.title: A reminder from FairSettle
first.body: Your co-parent is waiting for your input. There are {daysRemaining} days left before the case can proceed without your response.

second.subject: FairSettle reminder — your input is still needed
second.title: Your input is still needed
second.body: FairSettle is still waiting for your side of the story. There are {daysRemaining} days remaining before the case can proceed without your response.

final.subject: Final reminder — last chance to respond before this case proceeds without your input
final.title: Final reminder
final.body: This is the last reminder before the case can proceed without your input. There are {daysRemaining} days remaining to respond.

accepted.subject: Your co-parent has joined FairSettle
accepted.title: Your co-parent has joined
accepted.body: The other party has accepted your invitation and can now review the case and complete their own question flow.

responderCompleted.subject: Your co-parent has submitted their answers
responderCompleted.title: Their answers are now in
responderCompleted.body: Your co-parent has submitted their answers. You can now review the comparison view and move into the suggested outcomes stage.

exportReady.subject: Your case pack is ready to download
exportReady.title: Your case pack is ready
exportReady.body: Your {tier} export is ready to view and download from your FairSettle dashboard.

singleParty.subject: Your single-party export is ready
singleParty.title: Your single-party export is ready
singleParty.body: Your single-party case pack is ready. It documents your position and the other party's non-engagement.

footer.notice: FairSettle sends these updates so you can keep track of activity on your case.

pdf.executiveSummaryBody: A concise overview of the positions, agreements, and unresolved gaps in this case.
pdf.executiveSummaryNote: This document represents the positions of both parties and the structured outputs generated by FairSettle.
pdf.partyAPositionBody: The initiating party's answers organised by section.
pdf.partyBPositionBody: The responding party's answers organised by section.
pdf.comparisonBody: A question-by-question view of agreement and difference.
pdf.suggestionsBody: Rule-based suggestions for every remaining gap item.
pdf.evidenceBody: Files uploaded to support this case.
pdf.noEvidence: No supporting documents were uploaded for this case.
pdf.auditBody: A chronological record of the events logged during this case.
pdf.savingsBody: A comparison between the estimated solicitor route and the FairSettle route.
pdf.consentOrderBody: A draft set of clauses based on agreed points and accepted suggestions.
pdf.consentOrderDisclaimer: This is a draft template only. It must be reviewed by a solicitor before submission to court.
pdf.cooperationBody: Timing and engagement indicators for each party.
pdf.cooperationNote: Courts view demonstrated cooperation favourably in family proceedings.
pdf.nonEngagementBody: The invited party did not respond within the required period.
pdf.invitationTimelineBody: A timestamped record of communication attempts and expiry.

notFound.title: We couldn't find that page.
notFound.description: The link may be outdated, the page may have moved, or the address may be incorrect. You can head back to the homepage and continue from there.
